name: create_presentation
description: Create a new Google Slides presentation in the operator's Google Drive. Returns the presentation_id (use it with read_presentation / slides_batch_update) and a shareable edit URL.

operator.description: Optional. If omitted, resolves to the BlackBox's current operator (single operator auto-selected; otherwise the system default). Do not hard-code an operator name.

returns: JSON with presentation_id, title, and a docs.google.com/presentation edit url (or an error string).
notes: Requires Google Workspace connected for the operator (Slides scope granted by the Google sign-in in onboarding). A new presentation starts with one blank slide; add and populate slides with slides_batch_update.
